PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-05-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Olga Galvez, in court, in propria persona, Petitioner.

The court and Petitioner discuss what is expected of her should she be appointed Administrator and of her responsibilities to the Estate. The court confirms that the Estate's asset is one real property which is currently has a buyer and that the property has a reverse mortgage of approximately $500k and that the property is listed at approximately $700k. After a suggestion from the court that Petitioner hire an attorney to help her with this matter, Petitioner advises that hiring an attorney is not an option for her at this time. After additional discussion, the court acknowledges that there are no appearances to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration. Olga Galvez is appointed as Administrator of the estate with limited authority. Bond is not required. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on Filing Final Inventory and Appraisal is set for Apr-17-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on close of estate is set for Dec-18-2023 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
